# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: myApp
description: A Helm chart for myApp
version: 0.1.0

appVersion: 1.16.0

dependencies:
  - name: ingress
    version: 1.40.0
    repository: https://kubernetes-charts.storage.googleapis.com/

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: myApp-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: "*"
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: ImplementationSpecific
        path: "/"
        backend:
          service:
            name: myService
            port:
              number: 8080
